last_item: **Daemon broken: `_run_status_hook` is called but never defined** in `bin/backlog-agent`. Commit `ea44e7b` dropped the function definition during a refactor — the 3 call sites remain but every tick aborts (exit 127) at the status-hook step, so no `backlog-agent-status` commits are pushed and all `[~]` items stall. Fix: re-add the function as `_run_status_hook() { [[ -n "$HOOK" ]] && node "$HOOK" --item "$1" --exit-code "$2" --mode "$3" --pre-head "$4" --pulled "$5" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1 || true; }`.
